description_long: This humanoid robot features a large, oval-shaped head with two prominent, round blue eyes set wide apart, giving it a friendly and approachable appearance. Its head is flanked by two short, cylindrical protrusions on either side, possibly functioning as ears or antennae. The robot's body is compact and cylindrical, with articulated arms ending in three-fingered hands and sturdy, rounded legs with broad feet for stability. The surface is smooth and matte, primarily a pale grayish-pink color with darker accents at the joints and extremities. A small, circular blue detail is visible on the chest, possibly indicating a sensor or status light. The overall design is simple yet expressive, with a focus on soft curves and minimalistic features.
description: A friendly humanoid robot with a large oval head, wide blue eyes, articulated arms, and a smooth, pale grayish-pink body with dark accents.
description_view_0: Front view shows the robot's large blue eyes, small blue chest detail, and three-fingered hands extended forward.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the oval head's depth, cylindrical ear-like protrusions, and the robot's compact body profile.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the smooth, featureless back of the head and body, with arms and legs visible from behind.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the head's curvature and the alignment of the limbs.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with arms slightly bent and extended forward, legs straight and feet flat on the ground, head facing forward.
attribute_clothing_style: Unclothed; exterior consists of smooth, integrated panels with no visible clothing or decorative coverings.
attribute_facial_features: Face features two large, round blue eyes with no visible mouth or nose; the eyes are expressive and dominate the facial area.
attribute_limb_articulation: Arms and legs have visible hinge joints at the shoulders, elbows, hips, and knees; hands have three articulated fingers each, suggesting moderate flexibility.
attribute_presence_of_sensors: Visible sensors include two large blue eyes on the head, likely functioning as cameras or visual sensors; a small blue circle on the chest may be an additional sensor or indicator.
